sections.paragraph:
- Original: συγκαλύπτω

- Transliteration: Sugkalupto

- Phonetic: soong-kal-oop'-to

- Definition:

1. to cover on all sides, to conceal entirely, to cover up completely

- Origin: from G4862 and G2572

- TDNT entry: 19:23,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G2572; to conceal altogether: - cover.
